positive: A minimalist, stylized silhouette of a celestial fox spirit (Kitsune) sitting atop a glowing crescent moon. The fox is depicted in a graceful, flowing pose, surrounded by luminous magic trails and stardust. The background features deep indigo and cosmic violet gradients, contrasted by sharp gold and turquoise accents. The overall style is neo-Art Deco celestial fantasy, highly intricate, suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Strong geometric lines and clean, bold shapes dominate the composition. Symmetry is key. --ar 1:1 --style aesthetic --s 750
